violations.text: The date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

Cherry tomatoes were not washed before being placed on a ready-to-eat package salads. Plant foods must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are served in a ready-to-eat manner. Salads were washed during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

Handsinks near the seafood cooler, in the bakery area and in the produce area were draining very slowly during time of inspection. Plumbing systems to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

The fanguards in walk-in coolers and honeycomb filters throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
Allergen advisory statement was not present at the prepared food/deli area. Sign was placed in area at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

The hand-washing sink in the produce area was blocked by ( fruit disposal bin ). A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. The bin was moved during time of inspection Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (ice machine ) have an accumulation of black residue. Ice machine was cleaned at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
Gasket in meat cooler was in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2024

An employee observed cutting fruits on top of trash can. Bowl was placed on top of trash can. Prevention of contamination during food preparation reviewed. Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized the bowl and moved the trash can away from prep area during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023
Bulb in the Receiving room is not working. Bulb shall be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023
